privileged_info_summary: This is an interactive task in LimeSurvey that requires creating a new survey with the exact title 'Customer Satisfaction Survey' (case-insensitive match). The survey title must match the expected value verified across task specification, setup script, verification logic, and database search patterns. The partial match string 'customer satisfaction' is confirmed to be part of the full title and is used in database queries to locate the created survey.
